# Delaying getDisbursementInfo API hit after savePledgeLien API response

: Ameya Aglawe
Created time: January 3, 2025 7:12 PM
Status: Pending Review
Last edited: January 6, 2025 3:50 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

- For the first getDisbursementInfo API call post credit creation we are getting “No data Found” in the response of the getDisbursementInfo API
- Since we run a scheduler of 1 hour of getDisbursementInfo thus it takes another hour to get a valid response from getDisbursementInfo API response (after getting No Data Found in the response first time)

---

# **How do we measure success?**

- % of getDisbursementInfo API failure with “No Data Found” remarks go down to 0.

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

- For a 7 days period (26 December - 2 January) a total of 472 credits were created of out which 359 credits encountered “No Data Found” remarks in the getDisbursementInfo API response
- Rest of the 113 - “Exception: Cannot open database "Vantage_Prod" requested by the login. The login failed.” which was a intermittent issue (syncing issue) at TCL end which is fixed by TCL.
- These issues occur because we hit the getDisbursementInfo API instantly after getting the savePledgeLien API response, savePledgeLien API is processed in the lender’s system in this short time interval throwing thus throwing an error in the getDisbursementInfo API response

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

---

- TCL team has suggested to keep a 2.5 minute buffer time between savePledgeLien API response & getDisbursementInfo API request.
- We should delay the getDisbursementInfo API by 3 mins (to keep an extra buffer of 0.5 mins on top of the suggested delay) after getting response from savePledgeLien API
